name: agentic-showcase-root

scripts.dev: npx concurrently --kill-others "node services/api-server/index.js" "REACT_APP_API_URL=http://localhost:3001 npm start --prefix apps/dashboard"
scripts.test:e2e: npx concurrently --kill-others --success first "node services/api-server/index.js" "npm run dev" "npx playwright test"

description: This repository is a **fully autonomous, agent-driven monorepo**. It serves as a living laboratory for a zero-human-intervention software lifecycle.
